calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Samantha Ortiz, Esq. (213.480.6200; sortiz@younessilaw.com) of Law Offices of Ramin R. Younessi, APLC for Plaintiff.
Kimberly Carter, Esq. (310.712.6100; KCarter@KelleyDrye.com) of Kelley Drye & Warren LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WALSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY II, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues:

Defendant Walsh Construction Company II, LLC's Motion for Summary Judgment is granted.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
